scored_tasks.description: Verify tasks created in terminal A appear in terminal B with shared TASK_LIST_ID
Verify TaskUpdate (status change) from one terminal is reflected in TaskList from another
scored_tasks.notes: Status transitions propagated within same filesystem read

scored_tasks.description: Verify terminals without TASK_LIST_ID maintain independent lists (no cross-contamination)
scored_tasks.notes: Default behavior preserved when env var unset

decision_rationale: Functionality works as expected and improves coordination visibility. Value gate not met (speedup_ratio 0.15 < 0.2 threshold). Security and operability gates pending manual review. Recommend enabling on operator workstation as pilot before default-on promotion.
